criterion_description: Use the same five-instrument Stage B1 development subset, including at least one ETF.
Select 5 normal days, 2 explicit trend days and 1 explicit shock day.
Emit raw synthetic event rows for the selected symbols/days.
Emit event-driven feature rows from received synthetic feed observations.
Emit 1-second/event-driven feature rows only for symbols/windows supported by measured readiness.
Do not claim dense 1-second readiness where measured coverage does not support it.
Persist deterministic proof outputs with manifest and stable row counts.
acceptance_threshold: dataset rows stable and manifest records inputs/outputs
